original_image_tags: Two hole-punch marks visible at top of page, flanking the "RESTRICTED" stamp.
Handwritten note in red ink in lower left margin, written vertically: "additional copies behind file."
Handwritten annotation in blue ink in bottom center margin: "62-83894-164"

elements.description: A typed memorandum document with a 'RESTRICTED' stamp at the top and bottom, dated 15 February 1949, regarding 'UNCONVENTIONAL AIRCRAFT'. Includes handwritten annotations in the bottom left corner and a stamped red alphanumeric string '62-83894-164' at the bottom.

judge.reason: Description A reads the bottom alphanumeric as handwritten '62-83894-164' while Description B reads it as a stamped red string, creating a direct contradiction on the nature of the same visual element.
